summary: Mainstream product releases from Google Gemini CLI, Cline, Infinity (OpenCode), Mistral Vibe, and JetBrains benchmark signal a strong coding-agent and IDE-integration push. New infra primitives include agent observability (clawmetry), accountable memory (Cortex), and multi-agent orchestration (fusae). Dayona's $24M Series A and Stripe Projects integration highlight sandbox-as-a-service demand. User workflow signals are sparse; no high-confidence operator field reports found in this shard. | Grok 4.5 pricing disrupts coding AI; OpenCode gains traction as Claude Code alternative; verification loops boost model efficiency; MCP ecosystem expands with Quarkus and Quiote.

candidates.title: Google Gemini CLI v0.51.0-preview.0 released
candidates.why_it_matters: Gemini CLI remains the fastest-moving CLI agent; this release is only days old.

candidates.title: Gemini CLI v0.50.0 stable release
candidates.why_it_matters: Stable release signals production-readiness for CLI agent workflows.

candidates.title: Cline v4.0.7 released
candidates.why_it_matters: Cline is a leading open-source coding agent; patch releases imply active maintenance.

candidates.title: Cline CLI v3.0.39 released
candidates.why_it_matters: CLI variant ongoing updates indicate user demand for headless coding.

candidates.title: Mistral Launches Vibe for Code – coding agents in terminal, IDE, background
candidates.why_it_matters: Mistral enters the agentic coding arena directly; competes with Claude Code and Gemini CLI.

candidates.title: Mistral Studio – build/test AI agents and apps
candidates.why_it_matters: Studio platform for agent prototyping; pairs with Vibe for development.

candidates.title: Daytona Raises $24M Series A for agent sandboxes
candidates.why_it_matters: Sandbox-as-a-service funding validates infra for safe agent execution.

candidates.title: Daytona sandboxes available via Stripe Projects
candidates.why_it_matters: Integration with Stripe lowers adoption barrier for agent sandboxing.

candidates.title: Daytona Sandbox Firewall released
candidates.why_it_matters: Security primitive for agent sandboxes; matches enterprise compliance needs.

candidates.title: Clawmetry: real-time observability for 12 agent runtimes
candidates.why_it_matters: Observability infra for multi-runtime agent debugging; fills a clear gap.
candidates.next_check: need independent user report or adoption metric

candidates.title: JetBrains Kotlin Benchmark for AI Coding Agents
candidates.why_it_matters: Domain-specific benchmark for Kotlin agent evaluation; expands eval landscape.

candidates.title: Supabase + OpenCode: agentic coding on Supabase
candidates.why_it_matters: OpenCode integration shows database-adjacent agent coding workflow.

candidates.title: Grok 4.5 launches with aggressive coding agent pricing
candidates.why_it_matters: Undercuts Anthropic/OpenAI on coding agent pricing, potentially shifting market dynamics.
candidates.next_check: Monitor adoption and pricing impact on competitors.
